args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"other","RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Recovery script to search and extract all tool call arguments containing TestTypesView from transcript.jsonl."}
args.CodeContent:
"import os, json

path = "/Users/shubhamjain/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f7a0b14d-8a6e-4317-9440-6e98c0661b0f/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl"
with open(path, "r") as f:
    for line in f:
        obj = json.loads(line)
        step = obj.get("step_index")
        
        # Check tool_calls in any step
        if "tool_calls" in obj:
            for tc in obj["tool_calls"]:
                name = tc.get("name", "")
                args = tc.get("args", {})
                
                # Check all string values in args
                found = False
                for k, v in args.items():
                    val_str = str(v)
                    if "TestTypesView" in val_str:
                        found = True
                        print(f"=== Found in step {step} ({name}) - Arg '{k}' ===")
                        # Save the value to a file
                        out_name = f"scratch/step_{step}_{name}_{k}.txt"
                        if isinstance(v, str):
                            with open(out_name, "w") as out_f:
                                out_f.write(v)
                        else:
                            with open(out_name, "w") as out_f:
                                json.dump(v, out_f, indent=2)
                        print(f"  Saved to {out_name} (len={len(val_str)})")
        
        # Check direct content
        content = obj.get("content", "")
        if "TestTypesView" in content and obj.get("type") in ["VIEW_FILE", "CODE_ACTION", "USER_INPUT"]:
            print(f"=== Found in direct content step {step} ({obj.get('type')}) ===")
            out_name = f"scratch/step_{step}_{obj.get('type')}_content.txt"
            with open(out_name, "w") as out_f:
                out_f.write(content)
            print(f"  Saved to {out_name} (len={len(content)})")
"
args.Description: "Update recovery script to scan all tool calls and content logs"
